title: GoPro Mission 1 Hands-on: 25 (More) Questions Answered
content:
﻿

Just a quick heads-up that I dropped another video answering a slate of your questions on the new GoPro Mission 1 series. You can click the play button above, or here’s all the chapters in the video, covering all your questions (with plenty of other interesting tidbits mixed in there).

0:00 Quick Overview
0:36 Is HyperView Gone?
1:14 Where is Linear + Horizon Leveling?
1:38 What’s the FOV of the Camera?
2:04 What’s the 4K/60 battery life?
3:40 Can it connect to DJI Mics?
5:08 What’s the F-Stop (Aperture) of the lens?
5:33 What’s the minimum focusing distance?
6:00 Can you output HDMI without media mod?
6:51 Pairing with USB-C for video output?
7:16 Is there a pause option?
7:49 Can you use without battery?
8:05 How big are the files?
8:29 Is the touch screen better than Hero 13?
8:50 Can you get more Hero 13 Battery life with Enduro 2 battery?
9:55 Does it still have 1,440p?
10:04 Can you replace front lens cover?
10:17 Is there a Max Lens Mod coming?
10:57 What changed in TimeWarp?
11:28 Big changes in Timelapse!
12:13 Is there a new dive housing?
12:54 What’s the max MicroSD Card size?
13:10 Did you notice the extra weight?
13:40 Are there new integrations with GoPro Gimbal?
13:52 Why isn’t my subscriber discount showing?!?
14:28 Is this a Hero 14 Replacement?
16:06 When will I publish in-depth review?

With that – thanks for reading/watching!
author: Ray Maker
